question: Which case was ruled in favour of the merchant and why?
answer:
Case FR-2024-003 and FR-2024-009 were ruled in favour of the merchant. 
In case FR-2024-003, the chargeback was denied because CCTV footage showed the cardholder present at the premises and chip-and-PIN authentication was confirmed. 
In case FR-2024-009, the chargeback was denied due to signed delivery confirmation, GPS coordinates from the delivery vehicle matching the customer's address, and social media evidence showing the customer had received the laptop.
